Package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.entity.custom

package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.entity.custom
Contains custom entity implementations.

This package includes classes defining custom block entities and entity behavior required for the mod's magical mechanics.

Examples: WaterPrisonBlockEntity

Since:
0.1.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.entity
    Contains all block entity-related classes.

    WaterPrisonBlockEntity
    Represents the block entity logic for the WaterPrisonBlock.
